hooks.command: echo '--- 品質チェック ---' && echo '[Frontend] ESLint...' && npm --prefix frontend run lint 2>&1 && echo '[Frontend] ESLint: OK' && warn=$(mvn -f backend/pom.xml checkstyle:check 2>&1 | grep -c '^\[WARN\]' || true) && echo "[Backend] Checkstyle warnings: $warn 件" | { read msg; [ "$warn" -eq 0 ] && echo "$msg (OK)" || echo "$msg (mvn checkstyle:check で詳細確認)"; }
